task: Block B — Create-Task UI (additive, frontend-only, no money path). The Task Board displayed tasks but had no create action. Adds a '+ Create Task' button to the Task Board PageHeader and a CreateTaskModal (title, assignee from listUsers, scheduled date, category, priority, description) that calls the EXISTING POST /api/v1/tasks via createTask() and invalidates the planner query so the grid refreshes. No backend change (endpoint + tasks.task table already exist). No layout redesign of the board. Uses '+ Create' vocab per locked UI convention. Status defaults to Pending (not a create field).
